two_leg.name: The Bronx + Philly Power Duo
two_leg.reasoning: Two highest-rated picks, different game windows, both face below-average pitchers in HR-friendly parks with favorable wind. Low correlation, high payout.

two_leg.name: LHB vs LHP Edge Case
two_leg.reasoning: Both elite hitters with reverse splits or strong same-side numbers facing lefties they should crush. Different parks isolates risk.

three_leg.name: Triple Threat Sluggers
three_leg.reasoning: Three top-rated picks across three different games. Wind and weather favorable in two of three. Lottery ticket with model edge on every leg.

three_leg.name: Phillies Stack + Judge
three_leg.reasoning: Correlated stack play: Harper and Schwarber in same game vs same pitcher in HR park, plus uncorrelated Judge anchor. If Vasquez gets lit up, both Phillies legs hit together.
